title: Contribute, Volunteer or Choose a Career to Protect Nature – Protect Nature Challenge - Canada.ca
content:
## Contribute, Volunteer or Choose a Career to Protect Nature – Protect Nature Challenge
It’s time to get involved. We make the biggest difference together. There are hundreds of organizations and ways for getting involved to make a difference.
You are only limited by your imagination.
- Help protect our birds by participating in the Christmas Bird Count , Project Feederwatch , the Breeding Bird Survey , caretaking networks and more bird study programs .
- Help keep our waters clean by participating in a shoreline clean-up .
- Become a citizen scientist . You can explore and share your findings with Canada’s top researchers.
- Get behind the scenes at a national park by volunteering with Parks Canada .
- Volunteer with an environmental organization like the Nature Conservancy of Canada .
- Make a donation to an ecological organization.
- Plant trees with Tree Canada .
- Find your dream career with ECO Canada – Environmental Careers Organization.

## Let’s do this together
Share these challenges with your friends and family and show us what you are doing by tagging us in your social media messages and by using the hashtag #ProtectNature.
We’re on Instagram @canenvironment , Facebook @EnvironmentandClimateChange and Twitter @environmentca .
Check out our list of challenges to help protect nature.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
